---
title: "Probability Theory"
---

# Probability Theory {#sec-ch-03-probability}

The probability machinery the rest of the book leans on: Bayes' rule, common discrete and continuous distributions, the law of total probability, Q-Q diagnostics, and density estimation. The chapter is short on theory and long on R-side intuition.

This chapter contains **40 method pages** and **3 labs**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.qmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [Bayes' Theorem](bayes-theorem.qmd) | `bayes-theorem` |
| [Conditional Distributions](conditional-distributions.qmd) | `conditional-distributions` |
| [Conditional Probability](conditional-probability.qmd) | `conditional-probability` |
| [Convolutions of Distributions](convolutions.qmd) | `convolutions` |
| [Copulas: An Introduction](copulas-introduction.qmd) | `copulas-introduction` |
| [Discrete vs Continuous Variables](discrete-vs-continuous.qmd) | `discrete-vs-continuous` |
| [Expectation of a Random Variable](expectation.qmd) | `expectation` |
| [Independence](independence.qmd) | `independence` |
| [Joint Distributions](joint-distributions.qmd) | `joint-distributions` |
| [Kolmogorov's Axioms of Probability](kolmogorov-axioms.qmd) | `kolmogorov-axioms` |
| [Law of Total Probability](law-of-total-probability.qmd) | `law-of-total-probability` |
| [Marginal Distributions](marginal-distributions.qmd) | `marginal-distributions` |
| [Random Variables](random-variables.qmd) | `random-variables` |
| [Sample Space and Events](sample-space-events.qmd) | `sample-space-events` |
| [Student's t-Distribution](t-distribution.qmd) | `t-distribution` |
| [The Bernoulli Distribution](bernoulli-distribution.qmd) | `bernoulli-distribution` |
| [The Beta Distribution](beta-distribution.qmd) | `beta-distribution` |
| [The Binomial Distribution](binomial-distribution.qmd) | `binomial-distribution` |
| [The Chi-Squared Distribution](chi-squared-distribution.qmd) | `chi-squared-distribution` |
| [The Correlation Coefficient](correlation-coefficient.qmd) | `correlation-coefficient` |
| [The Cumulative Distribution Function](cumulative-distribution-function.qmd) | `cumulative-distribution-function` |
| [The Exponential Distribution](exponential-distribution.qmd) | `exponential-distribution` |
| [The F Distribution](f-distribution.qmd) | `f-distribution` |
| [The Gamma Distribution](gamma-distribution.qmd) | `gamma-distribution` |
| [The Geometric Distribution](geometric-distribution.qmd) | `geometric-distribution` |
| [The Hazard Function](hazard-function.qmd) | `hazard-function` |
| [The Hypergeometric Distribution](hypergeometric-distribution.qmd) | `hypergeometric-distribution` |
| [The Log-Normal Distribution](lognormal-distribution.qmd) | `lognormal-distribution` |
| [The Multinomial Distribution](multinomial-distribution.qmd) | `multinomial-distribution` |
| [The Multivariate Normal Distribution](multivariate-normal.qmd) | `multivariate-normal` |
| [The Negative Binomial Distribution](negative-binomial-distribution.qmd) | `negative-binomial-distribution` |
| [The Normal Distribution](normal-distribution.qmd) | `normal-distribution` |
| [The Poisson Distribution](poisson-distribution.qmd) | `poisson-distribution` |
| [The Probability Density Function](probability-density-function.qmd) | `probability-density-function` |
| [The Probability Mass Function](probability-mass-function.qmd) | `probability-mass-function` |
| [The Survival Function](survival-function.qmd) | `survival-function` |
| [The Uniform Distribution](uniform-distribution.qmd) | `uniform-distribution` |
| [The Weibull Distribution](weibull-distribution.qmd) | `weibull-distribution` |
| [Transformations of Random Variables](transformations-of-rv.qmd) | `transformations-of-rv` |
| [Variance and Covariance](variance-covariance-of-rv.qmd) | `variance-covariance-of-rv` |

## Labs

| # | Lab | Course / week / session |
|---|---|---|
| C1.7 | [Week 2, Session 2 — Probability, conditional probability, Bayes' theorem](labs/lab-probability-conditional-probability-bayes-theorem.qmd) | Course 1, week 2, session 2 |
| C1.9 | [Week 2, Session 4 — Discrete distributions: Bernoulli, binomial, Poisson](labs/lab-discrete-distributions-bernoulli-binomial-poisson.qmd) | Course 1, week 2, session 4 |
| C1.10 | [Week 2, Session 5 — Continuous distributions and Q-Q plots](labs/lab-continuous-distributions-and-q-q-plots.qmd) | Course 1, week 2, session 5 |
